zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Bowes於1464年出生在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素時，她的父親William Bowes49歲，母親Maud Fitzhugh36歲。她於1484年與Ralph Wycliffe Esq.在英國達勒姆達勒姆結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。她去世於1513年6月4日在英國達勒姆威克里夫享年49歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆威克里夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Bowes于1464年出生在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素时，她的父亲William Bowes49岁，母亲Maud Fitzhugh36岁。她于1484年与Ralph Wycliffe Esq.在英国達勒姆達勒姆结婚。他们至少是6个女儿的父母。她去世于1513年6月4日在英国達勒姆威克里夫享年49岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆威克里夫。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Bowes was born in 1464, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, her father, William Bowes, was 49 and her mother, Maud Fitzhugh, was 36. She married Ralph Wycliffe Esq. in 1484, in Durham, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. She died on 4 June 1513, in Wycliffe, Durham, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Wycliffe, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Bowes est née en 1464, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Bowes, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Maud Fitzhugh, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Wycliffe Esq. en 1484, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1513, à Wycliffe, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Wycliffe, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Bowes 1464 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bowes 49 und ihre Mutter Maud Fitzhugh 36. Sie hat 1484 in Durham, Durham, England Ralph Wycliffe Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1513 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Wycliffe, Durham, England und wurde in Wycliffe, Durham, England begraben.

Lei sposato Ralph Wycliffe Esq. nel 1484, nel Durham, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1513, nel Wycliffe, Durham, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Wycliffe, Durham, England.

ko.Of Streatlam, Durham, England: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Bowes(이)가 1464년 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bowes(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Fitzhugh(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 Ralph Wycliffe Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 6월 4일 영국 뒤람 윈이c리프에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 윈이c리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Bowes nasceu em 1464, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bowes, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Maud Fitzhugh, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Wycliffe Esq. em 1484, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1513, em Wycliffe, Durham, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Wycliffe, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Bowes родилась в 1464 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bowes было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Fitzhugh, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Wycliffe Esq. в 1484 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей. Она умерла 4 июня 1513 г. в местности виклифф, дурам, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности виклифф, дурам, Англия.

Se casó con Ralph Wycliffe Esq. en 1484, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijas.
